name: Hugging Face
description: Hub for open-source machine learning models, datasets, and demo Spaces with hosted inference.
freeTier: Free account with unlimited public models/datasets, community GPU-backed Spaces, and a rate-limited Inference API.

comparison.pricing: Free tier; Pro at $9/mo; pay-as-you-go inference endpoints

name: Ollama
description: Run open large language models like Llama, Mistral, and Gemma locally with a single command.
freeTier: Completely free and open source; runs entirely on your own hardware with no usage caps.

name: Groq
description: Ultra-low-latency LLM inference served on custom LPU hardware via an OpenAI-compatible API.
freeTier: Free developer tier with generous daily token limits across supported open models.

comparison.pricing: Free tier; usage-based pay-per-token beyond limits

name: OpenRouter
description: Unified API gateway that routes requests across hundreds of LLMs from many providers.
freeTier: Free access to a rotating set of free models plus credits to trial paid models.

name: Google AI Studio
description: Browser-based workspace to prototype prompts and build with the Gemini family of models.
freeTier: Free prompt prototyping and a free Gemini API tier with per-minute rate limits.

name: Vercel
description: Frontend cloud for deploying Next.js and other frameworks with global edge delivery and previews.
freeTier: Hobby plan: free personal projects, automatic HTTPS, preview deployments, and 100 GB bandwidth/mo.

comparison.authSupport: Through libraries and integrations (no built-in auth)
comparison.storageSupport: Vercel Blob storage on free tier

name: Netlify
description: Platform for deploying static sites and serverless functions with CI from Git.
freeTier: Free Starter: 100 GB bandwidth/mo, 300 build minutes, deploy previews, and serverless functions.

name: Cloudflare Pages
description: JAMstack hosting on Cloudflare's edge network with tight Workers integration.
freeTier: Free unlimited sites and requests, 500 builds/mo, and unlimited bandwidth.

comparison.realtimeSupport: Durable Objects and WebSockets via Workers

name: Render
description: Unified cloud for hosting web services, static sites, cron jobs, and managed databases.
freeTier: Free static sites and free web services that sleep after inactivity; free Postgres for 30 days.

name: Railway
description: Infrastructure platform to deploy apps, databases, and services from a Git repo with minimal config.
freeTier: One-time $5 trial credit to start; the Hobby plan is $5/mo and includes $5 of usage.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative offering Postgres, auth, storage, edge functions, and realtime.
freeTier: Free project: 500 MB Postgres, 1 GB storage, 50k monthly active auth users, and realtime.

comparison.databaseSupport: Full PostgreSQL with SQL access and row-level security
comparison.authSupport: Built-in auth with email, OAuth, and magic links

name: Neon
description: Serverless Postgres with branching, autoscaling, and scale-to-zero for development workflows.
freeTier: Free plan: 0.5 GB storage, autoscaling compute, and database branching for one project.

name: PlanetScale
description: MySQL-compatible serverless database platform built on Vitess with non-blocking schema changes and online schema migrations.
freeTier: No free tier — the free Hobby plan was discontinued in April 2024; paid plans now start at $39/mo. Listed for comparison; see Turso, Neon, or Supabase for free options.

comparison.pricing: Paid only; plans from $39/mo (free tier discontinued 2024)

name: MongoDB Atlas
description: Fully managed cloud document database with global clusters and full-text search.
freeTier: Free M0 shared cluster with 512 MB storage on AWS, GCP, or Azure.

comparison.storageSupport: Atlas Data Lake and GridFS for files

name: Firebase
description: Google's app development platform with realtime/Firestore databases, auth, hosting, and storage.
freeTier: Spark plan: free Firestore reads/writes quota, 1 GB storage, auth, and hosting.

name: Google Analytics
description: Web and app analytics platform for tracking traffic, events, and conversions.
freeTier: Free for standard use with event-based GA4 reporting and audience insights.

name: Plausible Analytics
description: Lightweight, privacy-friendly, cookie-free website analytics that is open source.
freeTier: Free when self-hosted; 30-day trial on the managed cloud service.

name: PostHog
description: Open-source product analytics suite with funnels, session replay, and feature flags.
freeTier: Generous free tier: 1M events, 5k recordings, and feature flags each month.

name: Umami
description: Simple, fast, privacy-focused open-source analytics you can self-host in minutes.
freeTier: Free and open source when self-hosted; free hosted tier with 100k events/mo.

name: Clerk
description: Drop-in authentication and user management with prebuilt UI components for modern apps.
freeTier: Free up to 10,000 monthly active users with prebuilt components and social logins.

comparison.authSupport: Full auth: email, OAuth, MFA, and session management
comparison.databaseSupport: Stores users; syncs to your database via webhooks
comparison.pricing: Free up to 10k MAU; Pro from $25/mo

name: Auth0
description: Identity platform providing authentication, authorization, and single sign-on as a service.
freeTier: Free up to 25,000 monthly active users with social and passwordless login.

comparison.pricing: Free up to 25k MAU; paid plans scale by features

name: Supabase Auth
description: Postgres-native authentication with row-level security, OAuth providers, and magic links.
freeTier: Included in the Supabase free tier with 50,000 monthly active users.

comparison.authSupport: Email, OAuth, magic links, and phone auth
comparison.databaseSupport: Tightly integrated with Supabase Postgres + RLS
comparison.pricing: Free with Supabase; scales on Pro at $25/mo

name: Firebase Authentication
description: Managed authentication backend supporting email, phone, and federated identity providers.
freeTier: Free for most providers; phone auth includes a limited free monthly verification quota.

comparison.authSupport: Email, phone, and many federated providers
comparison.pricing: Free tier; phone auth billed beyond free quota

name: Cloudinary
description: Media platform for uploading, transforming, optimizing, and delivering images and video.
freeTier: Free plan with 25 monthly credits covering storage, transformations, and bandwidth.

comparison.storageSupport: Optimized media storage with on-the-fly transforms

name: Supabase Storage
description: S3-compatible object storage with access policies tied to your Postgres auth rules.
freeTier: 1 GB of file storage included on the Supabase free tier.

comparison.storageSupport: S3-compatible object storage with RLS policies
comparison.pricing: Free 1 GB; scales with Supabase Pro

name: Backblaze B2
description: Low-cost S3-compatible cloud object storage with free egress to many CDN partners.
freeTier: First 10 GB of storage free, plus free daily download allowance.

name: Amazon S3
description: Industry-standard scalable object storage for files, backups, and static assets.
freeTier: Free tier: 5 GB standard storage for 12 months with limited requests.

name: Sentry
description: Application monitoring and error tracking with stack traces, releases, and performance tracing.
freeTier: Free Developer plan: 5k errors, 10k performance units, and basic alerting per month.

name: Grafana Cloud
description: Hosted observability stack for metrics, logs, and traces with prebuilt dashboards.
freeTier: Free forever tier: 10k metrics series, 50 GB logs and traces, and 14-day retention.

name: Better Stack
description: Uptime monitoring, incident management, and log management in one platform.
freeTier: Free plan with 10 monitors, status pages, and 3 GB of logs per month.

name: UptimeRobot
description: Simple uptime and status monitoring that alerts you when your services go down.
freeTier: Free plan with 50 monitors at 5-minute checks and public status pages.

name: GitHub Actions
description: CI/CD automation built into GitHub for building, testing, and deploying from workflows.
freeTier: Free unlimited minutes for public repos; 2,000 minutes/mo for private repos.

name: GitLab CI/CD
description: Integrated pipelines for building, testing, and deploying directly from GitLab repositories.

name: CircleCI
description: Cloud CI/CD platform with configurable pipelines, caching, and parallelism.

name: Postman

name: Hoppscotch

name: RapidAPI

name: Figma

description: Code hosting platform for version control, collaboration, issues, and pull requests.
